title: MikroTik Cloud Smart Switch CSS610-8G-2S+IN
description: MikroTik Cloud Smart Switch CSS610-8G-2S+IN is managable, 8-ports Gigabit switch with two SFP+ slots , completely silent fanless and kit for attach to 19" data cabinet. It also includes a specially designed operating system for fast switching and a wide range of settings - SwOS SwOS is configurable from your web browser. It gives you all the basic functionality for a managed switch, plus more: Allows to manage port-to-port forwarding, apply MAC filter, configure VLANs, mirror traffic, apply bandwidth limitation and even adjust some MAC and IP header fields Device Power adapter 24V/0.8A Rackmount ears 19"
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (8) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (2) 1G/10Gbps Power Power over Ethernet 12 .. 57V DC Power type PoE, DC connector PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 11 Power via connector/terminal 12 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design Desktop, Rackmount "U" positions 1 Fans No Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 20 up to 60 Width [mm] 200 Height [mm] 46 Depth [mm] 167 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 56 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 41,7
